summary: Second council session after all 6 prior findings were remediated. ADVOCATE-1 confirmed all fixes. CRITIC-1 and CRITIC-2 found 2 new actionable issues: (1) per-column filter test captured initialTotal but never compared it, making the test vacuous; (2) error-states beforeEach used bare revo-grid visibility instead of the standard waitForAppReady+waitForGridLoaded pattern. Both fixed. MEC-Miki data verification passed all endpoints. PR is ready to merge.
